title: Lower Stacks Entry
description: A vaulted corridor of cracked stone. A broken lantern bowl hangs from a brass chain above a dark stairway descending to the north. The air smells of dust and old ink.

exits.label: north
exits.reason: The lantern is unlit. The stairway is too dark to descend.

interactables.label: lantern bowl
interactables.description: The lantern bowl is etched with a contract circle and three reagent slots. A faint residue of old lumen clings to the rim.

interactables.label: brass chain
interactables.description: A heavy brass chain suspends the lantern bowl from the ceiling. The links are green with age.

title: Deep Stacks
description: Rows of collapsed shelving stretch into the dark. A rusted iron seal blocks the passage east. The south stairway leads back up to the entry.

exits.label: east
exits.reason: The iron seal holds firm. Its wards still glow faintly.

interactables.label: iron seal
interactables.description: A heavy iron disc set into the wall, inscribed with a motive-class ward. Three reagent grooves radiate from its center.

interactables.label: collapsed shelf
interactables.description: A shelf that buckled under its own weight long ago. Among the debris you find fragments of a catalogue page listing reagent properties.

title: Index Chamber
description: A circular room with a domed ceiling. The Archive Index floats in the center, its pages turning silently. The west passage leads back to the deep stacks.

interactables.label: archive index
interactables.description: The Archive Index is a floating codex of translucent pages. Many are blank or torn. A contract circle on its binding awaits a restoration compound.

interactables.label: floating pages
interactables.description: Loose pages drift in slow circles near the ceiling, their text too faded to read.
